name: PrinceXML
description: PrinceXML — HTML/CSS to PDF conversion engine with full CSS Paged Media support for print-quality output.

seo.title: PrinceXML — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: PrinceXML: PrinceXML — HTML/CSS to PDF conversion engine with full CSS Paged Media support for print-quality output.

when_to_use: High-fidelity CSS Paged Media PDF generation from HTML
Print-quality PDF output for publishing and technical docs
Converting complex HTML reports to print-ready PDF layouts
Book and magazine typesetting via HTML/CSS with PrinceXML
Regulatory document PDF generation with precise layout control

pros: Gold standard for CSS Paged Media
Handles complex books, reports, academic papers
Rock-solid, used in publishing for 20 years
cons: Learning CSS Paged Media is non-trivial
Slow to render very long documents
review.verdict: Unmatched for print-quality PDFs from HTML — if you need true book-grade output, nothing else comes close.
review.best_for: Publishers, scientific journals, and report generators needing professional print output.
review.not_for: Quick web-page-to-PDF tasks — lighter APIs are faster and cheaper.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
